[@microsoft/fast-element/declarative.js](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [ObserverMapConfig](../fast-element.observermapconfig/index.html) &gt; [properties](../fast-element.observermapconfig.properties/index.html)

## ObserverMapConfig.properties property

Per-root-property observation control. Keys are root property names discovered in the template schema. Only root properties listed here participate in observer-map observation. Omitting this field is equivalent to `"all"`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
properties?: {
        [rootProperty: string]: ObserverMapPathEntry;
    };
```
